zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Boteler於1429年3月12日出生在英國爾時，他的父親Sir John Boteler27歲，母親Isabel Harington25歲。他於1450年1月8日與Margaret Gerard在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1449年被列為knight of the shire。他去世於1463年2月26日在英國爾享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Boteler于1429年3月12日出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Sir John Boteler27岁，母亲Isabel Harington25岁。他于1450年1月8日与Margaret Gerard在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1449年被列为knight of the shire。他去世于1463年2月26日在英国爾享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Boteler was born on 12 March 1429, in Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Boteler, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Harington, was 25. He married Margaret Gerard on 8 January 1450, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1449, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as knight of the shire. He died on 26 February 1463, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Boteler est né le 12 mars 1429, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Boteler, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gerard le 8 janvier 1450, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1449, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the shire. Il est décédé le 26 février 1463, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Boteler am 12. März 1429 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Boteler 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Harington 25. Er hat am 8. Januar 1450 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1449, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight of the shire aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Februar 1463 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Cheshire, England und wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler è nato il il 12 marzo 1429 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Boteler, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Gerard il 8 gennaio 1450, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1449, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the shire. Morì il 26 febbraio 1463, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Botelerが1429年3月12日にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Botelerは27歳，母Isabel Haringtonは25歳であった。1450年1月8日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1449年，20歳の時，職業はknight of the shireと記録されている。彼は1463年2月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Boteler(이)가 1429년 3월 12일 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Boteler(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1450년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Margaret Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1449년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 knight of the shire이었다. 그는 1463년 2월 26일 영국 체실르에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 Mar 1429–26 Feb 1463: 12 de março de 1429–26 de fevereiro de 1463
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boteler nasceu em 12 de março de 1429, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Boteler, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gerard em 8 de janeiro de 1450, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1449, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight of the shire. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1463, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Boteler родился 12 марта 1429 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Boteler было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gerard 8 января 1450 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1449 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии knight of the shire. Он умер 26 февраля 1463 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.12 Mar 1429–26 Feb 1463: 12 de marzo de 1429–26 de febrero de 1463
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Boteler nació el 12 de marzo de 1429, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Boteler, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Gerard el 8 de enero de 1450, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1449, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era knight of the shire. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1463, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
